By The Numbers

The UAE's most trusted
telehealth platform.

Four steps.
That's all.

01
Download the App
iOS & Android. Sign up in 2 minutes with your Emirates ID or passport. No paperwork.
02
Choose a Service
Consultation, pharmacy, home care, mental wellness, lab tests — all available instantly.
03
Connect with a Doctor
A UAE-licensed physician joins in under 5 minutes, any hour of the day or night.
04
Receive Your Care
Prescription, treatment plan, medicine delivery — everything tracked in your TruDoc record.
Our Doctors

Licensed.
Verified.
Ready now.

Every TruDoc physician is licensed by UAE health authorities, verified through our credentialing process, and held to the exact same clinical standards as any physical clinic.

✓
DHA & DOH licensed across all specialties
✓
English, Arabic, Hindi & more
✓
Average response under 4 minutes
✓
Full records secured in your app
